C

com.github.roboboredom.CSC251Project - package com.github.roboboredom.CSC251Project
 
CPolicy - Class in com.github.roboboredom.CSC251Project
Models an insurance policy for one person.

Instantiate a new insurance policy object with defaults

Instantiate a new insurance policy object.
CPolicy.m_ESmokingStatus - Enum Class in com.github.roboboredom.CSC251Project
Available policy holder smoking statuses

F

F_dINSURANCE_POLICY_AGE_FEE - Static variable in class com.github.roboboredom.CSC251Project.CPolicy
Additional insurance policy age fee
F_dINSURANCE_POLICY_BASE_FEE - Static variable in class com.github.roboboredom.CSC251Project.CPolicy
Base insurance policy fee
F_dINSURANCE_POLICY_BMI_FEE_MULTIPLIER - Static variable in class com.github.roboboredom.CSC251Project.CPolicy
Additional insurance policy BMI fee multipler.
F_dINSURANCE_POLICY_BMI_FEE_THRESHOLD - Static variable in class com.github.roboboredom.CSC251Project.CPolicy
BMI threshold above which to apply the additional insurance policy BMI fee
F_dINSURANCE_POLICY_SMOKER_FEE - Static variable in class com.github.roboboredom.CSC251Project.CPolicy
Additional insurance policy smoker fee
F_iINSURANCE_POLICY_AGE_FEE_THRESHOLD - Static variable in class com.github.roboboredom.CSC251Project.CPolicy
Age threshold above which to apply the additional insurance policy age fee

Calculates the policy holder's insurance policy price.
